title: senecio squalidus subsp. aethnensis
intro: Senecio squalidus subsp. aethnensis, also known as Jacob's ladder, is a perennial plant species within the daisy family that is native to the mountains of Greece. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Senecio squalidus subsp. aethnensis include relief from digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome, and it has also been used to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
